name: Processing Subsystem
description: Executes mission payloads and sensor fusion

name: Storage Subsystem
description: Manages persistent data recording and encryption key lifecycle

name: Mission Computer
description: Runs payload algorithms and logs results

name: Solid State Recorder
description: Records high-rate sensor data to persistent storage

name: Key Management Module
description: Manages encryption keys for stored data

name: Execute Payload Algorithm
description: Runs sensor fusion pipeline and generates processed output

name: Log Results
description: Streams processed output to the Storage Subsystem at high rate

name: Write Encrypted Record
description: Encrypts a sensor frame and writes it to the solid state recorder

name: Request Encryption Key
description: Sends key request to the Key Management Module and receives response

name: Issue Encryption Key
description: Validates key request and returns encryption key to requestor

name: Sensor Fusion Output Interface
description: Carries fused sensor frames and metadata from Mission Computer to Solid State Recorder

name: Key Request Interface
description: Carries key request and key response between Mission Computer and Key Management Module

name: Remote Diagnostics Interface
description: Carries diagnostic request and report between Remote Operations and Mission Computer

name: Processing to Storage Subsystem Bus
description: Internal bus between Processing Subsystem and Storage Subsystem

name: Log Results to Write Encrypted Record
description: Function-level interface from Log Results function to Write Encrypted Record function
